content_body: We’ve truly enjoyed our father/son weekend, two generations of best friends. This cabin is amazing. Plenty of room and fun things to do, including exploring outside. We arrived early evening Friday, grilled out, and just enjoyed hanging out at the cabin. Saturday morning we watched an incredible sunrise, absolutely amazing! Mid-morning we went zip lining, another enjoyable adventure, and then went walking around Blue Ridge for awhile. While there we grabbed lunch at Chester’s (highly recommend the 4 cheese grilled cheese, tomato bisque, and french fries). We drove around and viewed some amazing sights and adventured a bit more around the cabin. Saturday night consisted of more grilling, a bon fire, and playing games. Sunday morning will include early rising to head back to Franklin, TN. Great cabin, great view, and great memories!  -Bryson Bryan, Carson Bryan, Lee LaGraize, Graham LaGraize
title: Great Father & Son Weekend!
